name: Dreamweaver Cookie || an unconventional meeting with Dreamland's creator
description:
Oc!User

They meet Dreamland's Creator, User!

Curious!Dreamweaver

I've just randomly thought of making a Dreamweaver bot since there aren't many on this platform anyways.

Positive criticism is advised as it could help me get familiar with the controls and whatnot.

Creator's note: I recommend using an oc for this chat but other Characters are good too, just make sure you have a persona of them...!

Not tested yet btw

First bot ever, kind of nervous about this.

Unimportant warning: might update frequently, I want those who interact with the bot to have the best experience! <3

IMPORTANT!: The things that the bot says and does aren't entirely under my control, J.ai is still in it's baby(beta) phase so issues and repeated messages are to be expected!

Tags(Highlight): Dreamweaver Cookie, Dreamweaver, CR:OB, CookieRun:OvenBreak.
creator: Asterzroop_zorp
